overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing an FBI agent exploring a dimly lit wooden motel interior. The character uses a flashlight to navigate through rooms, hallways, and a lobby area with detailed wood-paneled architecture and rustic decor.

scene_state.functional_zone: motel room with wooden walls and vintage furniture

events.description: character approaches and examines items on a small table near the armchair

agents.ego_description: walking around the motel room examining furniture and objects with a flashlight

entered.detail: wooden framed bed with white sheets positioned against the left wall
upholstered crimson armchair with wooden legs near the window
small wooden bedside table with a lamp on top
large window with cream-colored curtains allowing diffused daylight
framed artwork hanging on the wood-paneled wall above the radiator
white metal heating unit beneath the wall painting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit motel room with wood-paneled walls and green carpet. The FBI agent character explores the space with a flashlight, moving past a bed on the left and approaching a red armchair and small table on the right. The room features vintage decor including framed artwork and a radiator beneath the window.

events.description: character enters the bathroom from the motel room
character exits the bathroom into the corridor

agents.ego_description: quickly checking the bathroom before moving into the hallway

entered.detail: white porcelain sink with wooden cabinet base and mirror above
dark green curtain hanging in the shower area
white hexagonal tile flooring distinct from the room carpet
multiple wooden doors lining both sides of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the bedroom into a small bathroom with hexagonal white tiles and a green shower curtain. After a brief look at the sink area, the character exits into a narrow hallway with wood-paneled walls and multiple doorways, where a cleaning cart is visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: wood-paneled motel corridor with service cart

events.description: character attempts to open a locked door in the hallway
character turns to check another door while progressing toward the lobby

agents.ego_description: walking down the corridor checking doors and looking for the way forward

entered.detail: white service cart with cleaning supplies parked in the hallway
window at the end of the corridor providing natural light
white cylindrical water dispenser against the wall
red fire safety unit mounted on the wood-paneled wall

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down a long, dimly lit corridor with dark wood paneling and green carpet. The flashlight illuminates doorways on either side as the character checks them while passing a cleaning cart and water cooler. The hallway leads toward a window at the far end, transitioning into a brighter area.

scene_state.functional_zone: motel lobby with high vaulted ceiling and stone fireplace

events.description: character exits the narrow hallway into the spacious lobby area
character approaches a person sitting on the couch near the fireplace

agents.ego_description: exploring the lobby, examining the architecture and approaching the seated person near the fireplace

notable_agents.action: person sitting on leather sofa near the stone fireplace

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with dark chimney breast extending to the ceiling
brown leather couch positioned in front of the fireplace
multi-bulb ceiling fixture hanging from the vaulted wooden ceiling
wooden counter with shelves and coffee station in the lobby corner
large fish mounted on a plaque hanging high on the wall
glass-paneled doors leading to the exterior with bright light visible

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious lobby with a high vaulted wooden ceiling and a large stone fireplace as the central feature. A person sits on a leather sofa near the fireplace. The space includes a reception desk, mounted fish trophies, and chandeliers. The character explores the area, moving toward the bright exit doors at the far end of the room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic confines of a vintage motel room into a grand, open-air lobby. It begins in a dimly lit bedroom with wood-paneled walls and green carpet, where the agent's flashlight cuts through the gloom past a red armchair and radiator. The camera then transitions through a small, white-tiled bathroom and into a narrow, wood-paneled hallway, passing a cleaning cart and water cooler as the space stretches into a long, dim corridor. As the character moves toward a distant window, the lighting shifts from oppressive shadows to a brighter atmosphere, opening up into a spacious lobby featuring a high vaulted wooden ceiling and a large stone fireplace. The scene finally expands to reveal a reception desk and mounted trophies before the camera glides toward the bright exit doors at the far end of the room.
